heading: National high school and college debate topics
label: 1333 National high school and college debate topics
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., Supp. III, § 170 [§ 276a] (, , §§ 1, 2, ).Dec. 30, 1963Pub. L. 88–24677 Stat. 802
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., Supp. III, § 170 [§ 276a] (, , §§ 1, 2, ).Dec. 30, 1963Pub. L. 88–24677 Stat. 802

children.text: the subject selected annually by the National University Extension Association as the national high school debate topic and
the subject selected annually by the American Speech Association as the national college debate topic.

children.label: b
children.text: The compilations on the high school debate topics shall be printed as Senate documents and the compilations on the college debate topics shall be printed as House of Representatives documents, the cost of which shall be charged to the congressional allotment for printing and binding. Additional copies may be printed in the quantities and distributed in the manner the Joint Committee on Printing directs.
